title: 8Pack Christmas Paper Gift Bags,Large Sizes Gift Bags with Handle and Tissue Paper for Wrapping XMAS Present (Red)

【High Quality】Made of high-quality 210gsm thick premium white cardboard, which is thick, not easy to tear, durable & reusable. The gift bags are printed with exquisite Christmas elements patterns,never out of style.

【Assortment of Designs】Our gift bags are printed with 4 different exquisite XMAS elements patterns,meets your kinds of needs;each bag with tissue paper;which also ideal for small business bags,thank you bags during the winter or holiday;
【Easy to Use】Just put the gift in,don't need to wrap gift anymore;our bags are beautiful enough,would make a wonderful wrap effect for your gifts;

【Ideal for All 】You will get 8pcs christmas bags in 4 pattern,which can be usd for all kinds of person,family,grandpa,little nephew,neighbour...which really time & money saver; Bags with rope handles are sturdy enough to carry multiple items, puzzles, clothing, candles, toys, and more...
